strategy: Hit with Ice (+30% incoming); avoid Fire (57% resist).
He Tower-Shields himself (-65%) every time he takes damage, so chip damage is wasted. Use pierce or Shatter, or set up and land one big hit.
He self-casts a +40% Bladestorm every 3rd round, ramping his damage. Remove the blades or race him.
Stack traps and Feint (he has no ward-stealing cheats) and burst through the 14,460 health in one hit.
cheatNotes: Every 3rd round he self-buffs with a +40% Bladestorm. Strip it or out-pace it.
He puts a -65% Tower Shield on himself, blunting your hit. Pierce or Shatter it.
He re-applies that Tower Shield every time he is damaged, so many small hits get shielded away. Commit to one big attack instead.
